titleStmt.title: SII 26.403: original edition by P. R. Srinivasan
No. 403. (A.R. No. 382 of 1909.) SIDDHALIṄGAMAḌAM, TIRUKKOYILUR TALUK, SOUTH ARCOT DISTRICT.

summary.p: This inscription contains the praśasti of the king commencing with Pugaḻmādu viḷaṅga and mentions the queen Ulaguḍaiyāḷ.

It records a gift of land, 1,650 kuḻi in extent, as tax-free dēvadāna for offerings and lamps at the service of tiruppaḷḷiyeḻuchchi of the god Tiruppulippagavadēvar of Śiṟṟiṅgūr, a brahmadēyam in Kuṟukkaik-kūṟṟam in Malāḍu alias Jananāthavaḷanāḍu by a certain Pūvan Marudan alias Āḻvāṇaṅgāṟa Malaiyamān of Kiḷiyūr in Tirumuṉaippāḍi Dāmar-nāḍu. It is stated that the donor paid a sum of 17 kāśu as price for the land to the sabhai of Śiṟṟiṅgūr.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
svastiśrī . pukaḻmātu viḷaṅka jayamātu virumpa nilamakaḷ nilava malarmakaḷ puṇara Urimaiyi
ṟ ciṟan=ta maṇimuṭi cūṭi miṉavar nilaikeṭa villavar kulaitara Eṉai maṉṉavar Iriyaluṟritarat tikkaṇaittu
m tirucakkara naṭātti vijaiabhiṣekam paṇṇi Aruḷi vīrasiṁhāsanattu Ulakuṭaiyāḷoṭum viṟṟiru
n=taruḷiya kovirājakecaripanmarāṉa tribhuvanaccakravarttikaḷ śrīkulottuṅkacoḻa- devaṟku yāṇ
ṭu 4 10 9 vatu malāṭāna jananātavaḷanāṭṭuk kuṟukkaikkūṟṟattu brahmadeyam ciṟṟiṅkūr sabhaiyom Uṭai
yār tiruppulippakavadevaṟku tiruppaḷḷieḻuccikku tirumañcaṇak kuṭam pattukkum cāttiyaruḷat tirumālai
kaḷukkum tiruvamutarici nānāḻikkum kaṟiyamutu muṉṟukkum neyyamutu Oru ceviṭaraikkum tayiramutu
Urikkum Aṭaikkāyayamutu pākku nālukkum veṟṟilaiyamutu pattukkum Iccantikku can=tiviḷakku Eṭṭukkum ca
ndrādityaval nibandamāka tirumuṉaippāṭi tāmānāṭṭu kiḷiyūr pūvan marutanāṉa Āḻvāṇaṅkāṟa malai
yamāna Iṟaiyilidevatānamāka koṇṭuviṭṭa nilam patinālaṭik kolāl kuḻi Āyirattaṟuṉū
ṟṟaimpatukkum kiḻpāṟkellai puṟattaṟumā melvarampukkum tirucciṟṟampalavāykālukkum
tenpāṟkellai tiricciṟṟampalavāykkālukku vaṭakkum meṟpāṟkellai Erukampokikku nirpāyn=ta
vāykkālukkum marutūrellaikku kiḻakkum vaṭapāṟkellai Erukampokikku nirpāyanna vāykkālukku
teṟkum Āka Icain=ta nāṟperellaiyuḷ Akappaṭṭa nilamum tiricciṟṟampalavāykkālukku teṟku viṭṭa ni
lattukku kiḻpāṟkellai muṭakkuk kaḻuvalukku meṟkum teṉpāṟkellai maturān=takavāykkālukku vaṭa
kkum melpāṟkellai tiricciṟṟampalavāykkālukku kiḻakkum vaṭapāṟkellai Ittiricciṟṟampalavāy
kkālukku teṟkum Āka Icain=ta nāṟperellaiyuḷ Akappaṭṭa nilattil Īśvarakkolapāṭum pūttuṭai
kkuṇṭilum Uḷnilam nikki Uḷnilamoḻivinṟik kuḻi Āyirattaṟunūṟṟaimpatuk kum vilaidravyamāka
kācu patineḻum kaikkoṇṭu Iṟaiyili tevatānamāka viṭṭom sabhaiyom Itu panmāheśvara rakṣai .
Digital edition of SII 26.403 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
